name: coding-toolkit
description: Personal coding guardrails: fundamental dev principles (DRY/YAGNI/KISS/SINE), accuracy discipline, milestone review and delegation guidance; a task-workflow skill for repo project management (epics/milestones/tasks in an Obsidian vault) that hands off into superpowers; and a warn-only PreToolUse hook that nudges edits into an isolated git worktree.
